blocker_description: V2 SDKSession interface lacks interrupt(), setModel(), streamInput(), and other control methods present on V1 Query interface. These are required for Ctrl+C, /model command, and built-in tool handling (AskUserQuestion, ConfirmAction).

layer_ratings.assumptions: RISK (3/5 - two critical unverified assumptions A-2, A-3)
layer_ratings.failure_modes: RISK (3/5 - session crash blast radius, no interrupt in V2)
layer_ratings.cost_benefit: PASS (4/5 - clear ROI on latency improvement)
layer_ratings.testing: RISK (2/5 - existing tests are shallow, no event stream coverage)
layer_ratings.architecture_smells: PASS (3/5 - hook needs extraction, rest is clean)
layer_ratings.implementation_readiness: PASS (4/5 - clear path but V2 API gaps discovered)

recommended_next_step: Execute Phase 0 validation: test V2 session for settings loading, MCP server support, and control method availability
